// XenologySettings: Documentation keys (//) precede each setting block.
// EnableXenology: Master switch for kill tracking, xXP, hunt, and combat hooks.
// BottomTenPopularityMultiplier: Kill credit and kill-XP multiplier for globally least-killed species (bottom 10).
// BaseXenologyXpPerKill: Base xXP before popularity, hunt, and streak multipliers.
// DamageBonusPerWeightedKill: Outgoing damage bonus percent per lifetime kill (tune carefully).
// DamageBonusCapPercent: Maximum outgoing damage bonus percent from Xenology.
// DebounceSaveMilliseconds: Minimum delay between global species JSON flush to disk.
// DenylistWcids: Species excluded from hunt selection / ranking.
